---
title: "About Me"
---

::: {.hero-banner .text-center}

<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="add photo to /images" class="rounded-circle mb-3" width="250">

<h1>Adrian Felix Choquevillca</h1>

<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/adrian-choquevillca" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/adrianfcv?tab=repositories" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub
</a>

:::

## Background

I have a background that combines engineering problem-solving with business strategy, which drives my passion for product management. I enjoy understanding real user problems, turning ambiguity into clear decisions, and working across teams to build practical, scalable solutions. What motivates me most is creating products that deliver real value by aligning user needs, technical execution, and business impact.

### Education

- **Degree Name**, Manufacturing Engineering, BYU
- **Degree Name**, MBA, BYU

### Experience

#### Founder - The Trucking School
*2023 to Present*

- Founded and scaled a CDL training business, overseeing day-to-day operations, curriculum development, instructor management, and regulatory compliance
- Drove student enrollment and revenue growth through targeted digital marketing and strategic partnerships
- Leveraged business development, operations management, CRM systems, and customer acquisition strategies to build efficient processes and deliver consistent training outcomes

#### Founder - CDL Classroom
*2025 to Present*

- Founded CDL Classroom, an online CDL education platform, responsible for product development, content creation, and platform strategy
- Built scalable digital learning resources to support student success
- Applied skills in product planning, user-focused design, digital education tools, and process optimization to create an accessible and efficient learning experience

### Skills & Interests

I bring a strong mix of technical and analytical skills, including Python, R, SQL, data visualization tools, and product management platforms, paired with clear communication, cross-functional collaboration, and strategic problem-solving. Outside of work, I'm driven by entrepreneurship, continuous learning, and building products that create real-world impact.

### What's Next

I'm focused on continuing to grow and scale my businesses by building better systems, improving the customer experience, and using data to guide smarter decisions. I'm especially interested in partnerships, product improvements, and tools that help streamline operations, expand reach, and create long-term, sustainable growth.
